scripts.deploy:prod: pnpm run build && wrangler deploy --env production && pnpm run pages:prod
scripts.deploy:dev: pnpm run build && wrangler deploy --env dev && pnpm run pages:dev
scripts.cf:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --env production --remote
scripts.cf:migrate:dev: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --env dev --remote
scripts.pages:prod: wrangler pages deploy pages-proxy --project-name pet-place --branch main
scripts.pages:dev: wrangler pages deploy pages-proxy-dev --project-name pet-place-dev --branch development
scripts.test:e2e:tutorial: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_VIDEO=on playwright test --project=tutorial-chromium && node tools/e2e/collect-tutorial-videos.mjs
scripts.quality: pnpm run security:secrets && pnpm run lint && pnpm test && pnpm run test:e2e && pnpm run build
